## Description
Please provide a clear and concise description of your changes. What problem does this PR solve or what feature does it add?

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring (non-functional changes)

## Related Issues
Closes #(issue number) or relates to #(issue number)

## How Has This Been Tested?
Please describe the tests you've run to verify your changes:
- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Manual testing
- [ ] Tested with sample data/network traffic

**Test Configuration:**
- OS: 
- Python Version:
- Other relevant versions:

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

## Breaking Changes
Does this PR introduce breaking changes? If yes, please describe:
- What changes are breaking?
- How should users migrate?

## Performance Impact
Does this change affect performance? If yes, please describe:
- What is the impact?
- Have you benchmarked this change?

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the PR here (screenshots, design decisions, alternative approaches considered, etc.)

## Reviewer Notes
Any specific areas you'd like reviewed or questions for reviewers?
